C:\ST\STM32CubeCLT_1.20.0\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\HSM_Boundary_Test.dir/objects.a
C:\dev\llvm-mingw\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\HSM_Boundary_Test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\HSM_Boundary_Test.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\dev\llvm-mingw\bin\clang++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\HSM_Boundary_Test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o HSM_Boundary_Test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libHSM_Boundary_Test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\HSM_Boundary_Test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
